first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning for the 7/10 score remains consistent: the candidate is technically strong but lacks explicit people-management experience. The rephrasing of strengths and the substitution of one secondary concern (lack of advanced degree) for another (mobile-platform knowledge) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not appear to be influenced by the change in job locations from Western cities to Brazil.
